Interface GameObserver

All Known Implementing Classes:
ServerVirtualView
public interface GameObserver
Observer interface for game-level state changes in Mesos. Implemented by ServerVirtualView to forward model events to all connected clients.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    actionOfferTileChanged(int drawTop, int drawBottom)
    Called when the draw-action counts for the current player's offer tile change.
    void
    gameWinners(List<Player> winners)
    Called when the game is over and the winners have been determined.
    void
    onEraChanged(ERA currentEra)
    Called when the game advances to a new era.
    void
    onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial state to the observer.
    void
    onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
    Called when the game phase changes (e.g.
    void
    onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
    Called when a new player joins the lobby.
    void
    onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
    Called when it is a new player's turn to place their totem.
    void
    onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
    Called when it is a new player's turn to resolve their offer-tile actions.

  • Method Details

    • gameWinners

      void gameWinners(List<Player> winners)
      Called when the game is over and the winners have been determined.
      Parameters:
      winners - the list of winning players.

    • onGameChanged

      void onGameChanged(ERA currentEra, List<Player> players, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, Player playerToPlace, Player playerToPlay)
      Called once at game start to push the full initial state to the observer.
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the starting era.
      players - the list of all players.
      gamePhase - the starting game phase.
      playerToPlace - the first player to place their totem.
      playerToPlay - the first player to resolve actions.

    • onPlayerAdded

      void onPlayerAdded(Player playerAdded)
      Called when a new player joins the lobby.
      Parameters:
      playerAdded - the player who just joined.

    • onEraChanged

      void onEraChanged(ERA currentEra)
      Called when the game advances to a new era.
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the era that just started.

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
      Called when the game phase changes (e.g. placing → resolve action).
      Parameters:
      gamePhase - the new game phase.

    • onPlayerToPlaceChanged

      void onPlayerToPlaceChanged(Player newPlayerToPlace)
      Called when it is a new player's turn to place their totem.
      Parameters:
      newPlayerToPlace - the player who must place next.

    • onPlayerToPlayChanged

      void onPlayerToPlayChanged(Player newPlayerToPlay)
      Called when it is a new player's turn to resolve their offer-tile actions.
      Parameters:
      newPlayerToPlay - the player whose turn it now is.

    • actionOfferTileChanged

      void actionOfferTileChanged(int drawTop, int drawBottom)
      Called when the draw-action counts for the current player's offer tile change.
      Parameters:
      drawTop - the remaining top-row draw count.
      drawBottom - the remaining bottom-row draw count.
